3561.one_line_summary: Proxy pattern with delayed upgrades and trust minimization period.
3561.notes: Extends EIP-1967 transparent proxy with time-delay and zero-trust period mechanism for safer upgradeability.

3569.one_line_summary: NFT metadata sealing standard enabling immutable metadata on decentralized storage.
3569.notes: Allows creators to seal metadata for NFTs, preventing changes and enabling batch metadata retrieval.

3589.one_line_summary: ERC-721 extension for assembling ether, ERC-20, ERC-721, and ERC-1155 tokens into NFTs.
3589.notes: Enables batch asset swapping by packaging diverse assets as a single ERC-721 token.

3643.one_line_summary: Institutional-grade security token standard with compliance, identity, and regulatory control.
3643.notes: Comprehensive framework for regulated security tokens, includes identity registry, compliance, and trusted issuers. Final status.

3668.one_line_summary: CCIP Read protocol for secure off-chain data retrieval by smart contracts.
3668.notes: Enables contracts to fetch external data transparently via standardized gateway interface and callback mechanism. Final status.

3722.one_line_summary: Minimal smart contract for decentralized social media enabling posts to IPFS.
3722.notes: Ridiculously simple contract emitting content and tag as events; builds application state off-chain via indexer.

3754.one_line_summary: NFT standard for abstract ownership such as rights, memberships, and coupons.
3754.notes: Simplifies ERC-721 by removing URI-related fields; designed for representing abstract rights and utilities.

3770.one_line_summary: Chain-specific address format using human-readable prefix to prevent fund loss in multichain.
3770.notes: Addresses ambiguity in EVM multichain by prepending chain shortName to addresses (e.g. eth:0x...).

3772.one_line_summary: Lossy compression of uint256 into smaller types for storage cost reduction up to 4x.
3772.notes: Divides compressed value into significant bits and shift amount; includes two decompression strategies.

4337.one_line_summary: Account abstraction via UserOperations and alt mempool without consensus-layer changes.
4337.notes: Defines UserOperation, EntryPoint, bundlers, paymasters, and factories for smart contract-based account validation. Final status.

4341.one_line_summary: NFT batch standard preserving ordering for logographic characters and emojis.
4341.notes: Extends ERC-3754 to retain ordering of NFT sequences, enabling meaning transmission via token IDs.

4353.one_line_summary: Interface for querying staked tokens bound to NFTs.
4353.notes: Simple interface enabling wallets to display staked token amounts for NFTs, supporting escrow and reward use cases.

4361.one_line_summary: Standard for Ethereum account authentication via signed messages for off-chain sessions.
4361.notes: SIWE protocol enabling self-custodial login alternative to centralized IdPs, with EOA and contract account support. Final status.

4393.one_line_summary: Micropayment standard for tipping NFT and multi-token holders via tip tokens.
4393.notes: Interface for tip tokens exchanged for ERC-20, enabling batched tipping to NFT holders with gas optimization.

4400.one_line_summary: ERC-721 consumer role extension separating utility rights from ownership.
4400.notes: Adds consumer address field and changeConsumer method; consumer cannot own/approve/transfer. Final status.
